ON CREATE SET src1.title = 'FiveHands Ransomware variant overview', src1.publisher = 'CISA', src1.published_on = date('2021-05-06')
ON MATCH SET src1.title = coalesce(src1.title,'FiveHands Ransomware variant overview'),
             src1.publisher = coalesce(src1.publisher,'CISA'),
             src1.published_on = coalesce(src1.published_on, date('2021-05-06'))
MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'CISA_FiveHands_2021-05-06_incident_1'})
ON CREATE SET inc1.date = date('2021-05-06'), inc1.type = 'ransomware', inc1.summary = 'CISA overview of a FiveHands ransomware variant attack. Actor used publicly available pen test and exploitation tools plus FiveHands ransomware (ServeManager.exe) and SombRAT RAT to steal information, obfuscate files, perform network discovery and credential access, and demand ransom. Initial access was via a zero-day vulnerability in a VPN product; used WMI to enumerate and delete Volume Shadow Copies; encrypted recovery folder files; wrote ransom notes to directories.'
ON MATCH SET inc1.date = coalesce(inc1.date, date('2021-05-06')),
             inc1.type = coalesce(inc1.type, 'ransomware'),
             inc1.summary = coalesce(inc1.summary, 'CISA overview of a FiveHands ransomware variant attack. Actor used publicly available pen test and exploitation tools plus FiveHands ransomware (ServeManager.exe) and SombRAT RAT to steal information, obfuscate files, perform network discovery and credential access, and demand ransom. Initial access was via a zero-day vulnerability in a VPN product; used WMI to enumerate and delete Volume Shadow Copies; encrypted recovery folder files; wrote ransom notes to directories.')
MERGE (inc1)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'CISA reports that the variant used publicly-available pen test and exploitation tools, plus FiveHands ransomware and SombRAT remote access trojan (RAT)... The initial access vector was a zero-day vulnerability in a VPN product.'}]->(src1)

ON MATCH SET vic1.summary = coalesce(vic1.summary, 'Organization successfully attacked by FiveHands ransomware variant (victim name not provided in source).')

MERGE (mal1:Malware {name:'FiveHands'})
